name: support-claude-docs
description: Browse and read the support.claude.com /en/ help center from a local per-collection markdown mirror — no network, token-cheap.
long_description: Exposes the vendor/support-claude-sitemap mirror (16 collections of coworker-optimized .md) as MCP tools: list_collections, list_articles, read_article. Reads only local files under the configured mirror directory; nothing leaves the machine.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List the support collections in the local mirror

tools.name: list_articles
tools.description: List article .md files in a collection
